title: Time to run my auto strats on real money
author: PeaceOfMiind
selftext:
I've been strictly forward testing automated strategies from late November last year and added in a new one each month, where I now have automation for ES, NQ, and SI (will need a bit more data on this one before live cap since I know SI can be a monster). But after close to 3 months of full time fwd testing without interfering, think it's time to test in real markets to see if it can maintain with slippage.



If anyone knows the quickest webhook enabled trade forwarder that can connect to a futures broker, please share. I've used TradersPost before but did not like the random latency.
